title: Create Penguin
description: the pack for create.penguinuniverse.us a invite-only create mod minecraft server
body:
Minecraft mod pack, exclusively designed for the Create.PenguinUniverse.US server. This carefully curated collection of mods invites you to explore a world of endless possibilities and enhance your Minecraft adventures.

Step into a realm where innovation knows no bounds with the Create mod and its various expansions, including Chunkloading and Confectionery, adding a unique twist to your gameplay. Create awe-inspiring contraptions and infuse sweetness into your creations.

Experience the convenience of automation with Just Enough Items and Create: Steam 'n' Rails. Stay organized with Inventory HUD+ and forge connections seamlessly with the Simple Voice Chat mod. Embark on epic adventures with the help of Sophisticated Backpacks, Waystones, Xaero's Minimap, and Xaero's World Map.

Join us on the Create.PenguinUniverse.US server and set your creativity free with this exceptional mod pack. Elevate your Minecraft journey and explore boundless opportunities today!

this mod pack is mainly for the create.penguinuniverse.us server so if you are not playing on that server you dont need to download but if you want to join ill attach a discord to this mod where you can be whitelisted on this server.
